summary: Tested Admin User 360 restructured page - Backend APIs and Frontend UI. Fixed critical bug in action endpoint (missing transaction_id causing DuplicateKeyError). All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend E2E tests passed - login, navigation, search by UID/email, user profile display, stats, transactions, referrals, and admin actions all working.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend admin_user360.py: Fixed missing transaction_id in add_prc and deduct_prc actions - was causing DuplicateKeyError on MongoDB unique index
Backend search endpoint correctly handles UID, email, mobile, referral code, PAN searches
Backend full endpoint returns complete user data: profile, stats, referrals, transactions, redeem_requests, subscription_history, kyc, login_history
Backend action endpoint supports: ban, unban, add_prc, deduct_prc, update_plan
Frontend AdminUser360New.js correctly displays all sections: UserProfileCard, StatCards, TransactionsTable, ReferralSection, RedeemRequestsTable, AdminActions
Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for testing: user360-search-input, user360-search-button
seed_data_creation: Fixed admin user pin_migrated flag to allow login without PIN migration prompt
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin User 360 page fully tested and working. Backend APIs: /api/admin/user360/search, /api/admin/user360/full/{uid}, /api/admin/user360/action/{uid}, /api/admin/user360/quick-stats/{uid}. Frontend displays user profile, stats, transactions, referrals, and admin actions. Bug fixed: transaction_id was missing in action endpoint causing MongoDB DuplicateKeyError.

bug_fix_applied.issue: Missing transaction_id in add_prc and deduct_prc actions causing DuplicateKeyError
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added uuid import and transaction_id: str(uuid.uuid4()) to both transaction insert operations

features_tested.user360_full_data_load: PASS - Shows profile, stats, transactions, referrals
